name: ShCh-309
events: 25 Aug 1942 While on patrol off Aland, ShCh-309 attacked a convoy and fires two torpedoes. The Finnish minelayer Louhi was missed in this attack.
30 Aug 1942 While still on patrol off Aland, ShCh-309 sights another convoy and fires a torpedo against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 6000 GRT. The torpedo missed its target.

4 Sep 1942 While continuing her patrol off Aland, ShCh-309 sights another convoy and fires two torpedo against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 10000 GRT. Both torpedo's missed their intended target.
11 Sep 1942 ShCh-309 attacked another convoy and torpedoed and sank the Finnish merchant Bonden (695 GRT) south of Aland in position 59°55'N, 19°54'E. (1)
10 Nov 1944 ShCh-309 torpedoed and sank the German merchant Carl Cords (903 GRT) north-west of Ventspils, Latvia in position 57°30'N, 21°20'E.
12 Nov 1944 ShCh-309 fires two torpedoes against the German minesweeper M 22 west of Ventspils, Latvis in position 57°21'N, 21°00'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.

21 Nov 1944 At 1724 hours ShCh-309 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a destroyer 8 nautical miles north-west of the Sworbe lighthouse. Both torpedoes missed their so far unidentified target.
7 Dec 1944 ShCh-309 torpedoed and sank the German merchant Nordenham (4592 GRT) about 11 nautical miles north-west of Uzava, Latvia in position 57°24'N, 22°00'E.
This position is however on land, 21°E seems more likely.
23 Feb 1945 ShCh-309 torpedoed and sank the German merchant G?ttingen (6267 GRT) south-west of Libau in position 56°18'N, 20°16'E.
24 Feb 1945 At 2324 hours ShCh-309 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 8000 GRT. Both torpedoes missed their target. Location of the attack was near Libau.
26 Feb 1945 At 2315 hours ShCh-309 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 8000 GRT. Both torpedoes missed their target.
10 minutes later ShCh-309 fires another two torpedoes but these also missed.
Location of the attacks was near Libau.
19 Apr 1945 While operating in the Pillau area, at 0502 hours, ShCh-309 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' an auxiliary minesweeper. Both torpedoes missed their target.
24 Apr 1945 While operating in the Pillau area, at 0342 hours, ShCh-309 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' an auxiliary submarine chaser. Both torpedoes missed their target.
